name: Dark Angel Olivia
cardText: [fanfare] Choose up to 2 of the following. (1) Gain 1 Evolution Point. (2) Give your leader [defense]+3. (3) Draw a card. (4) Each opponent discards a card.

effectText.body: Choose up to 2 of the following. (1) Gain 1 Evolution Point. (2) Give your leader [defense]+3. (3) Draw a card. (4) Each opponent discards a card.

name: Bahamut
cardText:
[evolve][cost00]: Evolve this follower.
[fanfare] Destroy each other follower on the field.
If there are at least 2 enemy followers on the field, this follower can't attack enemy leaders.

effectText.body: Destroy each other follower on the field.

name: Bahamut (Evolved)
cardText:
On Evolve: Destroy each amulet on the field.
If there are at least 2 enemy followers on the field, this follower can't attack enemy leaders.

effectText.body: Destroy each amulet on the field.

name: Demonic Simulacrum
cardText: [fanfare] Deal 3 damage to your leader. Discard a random card.

effectText.body: Deal 3 damage to your leader. Discard a random card.

name: Archangel Reina (Evolved)
cardText:
Ward.
On Evolve: Recover play points equal to the number of faceup evolved followers in your evolve deck. Turn them facedown.

effectText.body: Recover play points equal to the number of faceup evolved followers in your evolve deck. Turn them facedown.

name: Surefire Bullet
cardText:
[quick]
Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If it's an evolved follower, deal 4 damage instead.

effectText.body: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If it's an evolved follower, deal 4 damage instead.

name: Unicorn Dancer Unica
cardText:
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.
Strike: Give your leader [defense]+2.

name: Gourmet Emperor Khaiza
cardText: [fanfare] Select an enemy follower that costs 2 play points or less on the field. Destroy it and give its leader [defense]+3.

effectText.body: Select an enemy follower that costs 2 play points or less on the field. Destroy it and give its leader [defense]+3.

name: Call of Cocytus
cardText:
[quick]
Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it, then search your deck for a [neutral] follower, reveal it, and add it to your hand.

effectText.body: Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it, then search your deck for a [neutral] follower, reveal it, and add it to your hand.
Search your deck for a [neutral] follower, reveal it, and add it to your hand.

name: Hamsa
cardText: [fanfare] Reveal the top card of your deck. Give this follower [attack]+X. X equals the revealed card's cost.

effectText.body: Reveal the top card of your deck. Give this follower [attack]+X. X equals the revealed card's cost.

name: Dance of Death
cardText: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 5 damage to it and 2 damage to its leader.

effectText.body: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 5 damage to it and 2 damage to its leader.
